languages.text: Сколько бы разведчики не бродили по бесконечной темноте ксеносских туннелей, они не в силах отыскать даже намека на чудные конструкции, что встретили вас в прошлый раз. Огромный музей исчез, будто его и не было — осталась только тьма и мертвая тишина.

No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.
languages.original_text: Сколько бы разведчики не бродили по бесконечной темноте ксеносских туннелей, они не в силах отыскать даже намека на чудные конструкции, что встретили вас в прошлый раз. Огромный музей исчез, будто его и не было — осталась только тьма и мертвая тишина.

traits.locale_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

languages.text: 異星人のトンネルの果てなく続く闇を、何人ものスカウトがさまよい歩いても、あなたに最後の訪問時に見せたような、素晴らしい建造物のわずかな手がかりも見つからない。広大な博物館は、存在したこともなかったかのように消え去り、その跡にはただ闇と死の静けさだけが残っている。
languages.original_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

traits.locale_text: 異星人のトンネルの果てなく続く闇を、何人ものスカウトがさまよい歩いても、あなたに最後の訪問時に見せたような、素晴らしい建造物のわずかな手がかりも見つからない。広大な博物館は、存在したこともなかったかのように消え去り、その跡にはただ闇と死の静けさだけが残っている。

languages.text: No importa cuántos exploradores recorran la negrura infinita de los túneles xenos, no encuentran ni rastro de las maravillosas estructuras que te recibieron la anterior vez. El colosal museo se ha esfumado como si nunca hubiera existido, dejando solo oscuridad y un silencio sepulcral a su paso.
languages.original_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

traits.locale_text: No importa cuántos exploradores recorran la negrura infinita de los túneles xenos, no encuentran ni rastro de las maravillosas estructuras que te recibieron la anterior vez. El colosal museo se ha esfumado como si nunca hubiera existido, dejando solo oscuridad y un silencio sepulcral a su paso.

languages.text: Egal, wie viele Späher durch die endlose Schwärze der Xenos-Stollen streifen, finden sie nicht den kleinsten Hinweis auf die wundersamen Strukturen, die dich bei deinem letzten Besuch begrüßt hatten. Das riesige Museum ist verschwunden, als hätte es nie existiert. Was bleibt, sind Dunkelheit und eine tödliche Stille.
languages.original_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

traits.locale_text: Egal, wie viele Späher durch die endlose Schwärze der Xenos-Stollen streifen, finden sie nicht den kleinsten Hinweis auf die wundersamen Strukturen, die dich bei deinem letzten Besuch begrüßt hatten. Das riesige Museum ist verschwunden, als hätte es nie existiert. Was bleibt, sind Dunkelheit und eine tödliche Stille.

languages.text: Les éclaireurs ont beau se succéder dans ces interminables tunnels xénos, aucun ne semble parvenir à trouver la moindre trace de l'existence des incroyables structures que vous aviez découvertes. L'immense musée a disparu sans laisser de traces, comme s'il n'avait jamais existé. Seuls demeurent l'obscurité et un silence de mort.
languages.original_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

traits.locale_text: Les éclaireurs ont beau se succéder dans ces interminables tunnels xénos, aucun ne semble parvenir à trouver la moindre trace de l'existence des incroyables structures que vous aviez découvertes. L'immense musée a disparu sans laisser de traces, comme s'il n'avait jamais existé. Seuls demeurent l'obscurité et un silence de mort.

languages.text: 众多侦察人员在异形隧道的无尽黑暗中反复搜寻，始终未能发现先前与你照面的那些宏伟奇构的丝毫痕迹。那庞大的陈列馆已然消失，仿佛从未存在过，只在身后留下彻底的黑暗与死寂。
languages.original_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

traits.locale_text: 众多侦察人员在异形隧道的无尽黑暗中反复搜寻，始终未能发现先前与你照面的那些宏伟奇构的丝毫痕迹。那庞大的陈列馆已然消失，仿佛从未存在过，只在身后留下彻底的黑暗与死寂。

languages.text: Kaç keşif kolu zeno tünellerinin sonsuz karanlığında dolaşırsa dolaşsın, geçen sefer karşılaştığın o harikulade yapılara dair en ufak bir ipucu bile bulamıyorlar. O devasa salon, sanki hiç var olmamış gibi gitmiş. Ardında ise sadece karanlık ve ölü bir sessizlik bırakmış.
languages.original_text: No matter how many scouts wander through the endless black of the xenos tunnels, they fail to find the smallest hint of the wondrous structures that greeted you the last time. The vast museum is gone, as if it had never existed, leaving only darkness and dead silence in its wake.

traits.locale_text: Kaç keşif kolu zeno tünellerinin sonsuz karanlığında dolaşırsa dolaşsın, geçen sefer karşılaştığın o harikulade yapılara dair en ufak bir ipucu bile bulamıyorlar. O devasa salon, sanki hiç var olmamış gibi gitmiş. Ardında ise sadece karanlık ve ölü bir sessizlik bırakmış.
